goal: Replace selection-like component highlighting with a player-first teacher guide, local focus glow, teacher pointer beam, neutral lecture lighting, subtitles, optional ElevenLabs audio, and synchronized biology animations.
acceptance_notes: Old V1 station runtime is removed from Workspace and old lesson scripts are disabled.
Audio SoundIds remain blank until Roblox audio upload/moderation, so subtitles are the immediate fallback.
Teacher starts near the player spawn, introduces the lecture, then moves between topic waypoints.
Whole-object Highlight adorners are not used; focus is local glow plus a pointer beam.
Teacher movement, organ captions, local lighting, and animations are self-contained in Roblox.
Play-mode visual/audio behavior still needs manual review in the active Studio session.
